title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Production Engineer for our Pune team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited:
Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
